call_digest.call_type: Coaching / Business Strategy / Spiritual Alignment - Number Two
main_themes: Symptom vs. Problem: Thought loops are a symptom of misplaced worship.
The 'Pitcher' Analogy: Training the mind requires practice repetition.
Repentance vs. Willpower: Turning away from habit-loops.
emotional_peaks: Austin's frustration with ADHD-fueled thought loops.
The Handshake Deal: Committing to coaching despite struggle.
top_objections: The Miracle Trap (asking for a snap of the fingers)
The Financial Bottleneck (debt/bills vs wisdom investment)
top_truth_flips: Solving the idolatry stops the symptom (thoughts) automatically.
God is training you to throw a curveball, not giving you a miracle.
Sales is helping others make correct decisions based on alignment.

nuggets.idea_one_liner: Stop trying to kill the thoughts; kill the idolatry and the thoughts will starve to death.
nuggets.proof_quote: You've been trying to stop the symptom... solving the problem would then stop the symptom as a byproduct.

nuggets.idea_one_liner: God isn't raising the dead because He's too busy training you to throw a curveball.
nuggets.proof_quote: Repetition of practice. ... He's teaching you to move your mind the same way you've trained yourself to move your hands.

top_5_nuggets.one_liner: Cut the power at the idol, and the thought loop dies.

creator_notes.tone: Strategic and athletic. (Reprocessed Run Number Two).
